known_issues: In the 'create new appointment' flow, the field to select an existing client has disappeared (regression) and needs to be restored.

existing_features.title: Restore an "existing client" selection field in the "New appointment" flow so users can pick an already-created client record when creating a new appointment.
When an existing client is selected during appointment creation, automatically populate appointment form fields from that client record and keep the appointment tied to that client's reference.

Fix the create-appointment validation so selecting an existing client does not trigger the "duplicate reference" error, while still preventing accidental creation with a new reference that already exists.

projectName: Restore existing client selection in New Appointment dialog
